TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Masisi i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Masisi. u kasalumaluma' nu Masisi sa, 70 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 239 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 229 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 10 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 92%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: masisi i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu masisi. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu masisi sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Masisi i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Masisi. u kasalumaluma' nu Masisi sa, 70 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 239 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 229 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 10 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 92%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: masisi i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu masisi. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu masisi sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, bunun *%, zumazuma *%.
